programme.desc: During the economic turmoil of 2008, Jackie Cogan (Brad Pitt), an enforcer, is hired to restore order after three idiots rob a mob-protected poker game.

programme.title: Battle Royale, (2000, Action)
programme.desc: A group of students from a Japanese high school are forced to compete in a battle, killing one another until only one is left standing.

programme.title: Ghost In The Shell, (1995, Anime)
programme.desc: 2029 – A female government cyber agent and the Internal Bureau of Investigations are hot on the trail of a "The Puppet Master" – a computer virus capable of invading cybernetic brains and altering its victim’s memory.

programme.title: Seven Samurai, (1956, Drama)
programme.desc: Farmers from a village exploited by bandits hire a veteran samurai for protection, and he gathers six other samurai to join him.

programme.title: Charade, (1963, Thriller)
programme.desc: Romance and suspense ensue in Paris as a woman is pursued by several men who want a fortune her murdered husband had stolen. Whom can she trust?

programme.title: Witness, (1985, Action)
programme.desc: When a young Amish woman and her son get caught up in the murder of an undercover narcotic's agent, their saviour turns out to be hardened Philadelphia detective John Book.

programme.title: Hard Rain, (1997, Action)
programme.desc: The setting is the evacuated town of Huntingburg, where armored car driver Tom is in deep danger. A gang of thieves figures the flood is its chance to heist the $3 million Tom's transporting from local banks.

programme.title: Next of Kin, (1989, Action)
programme.desc: When policeman Truman Gates' younger brother is murdered by the mob, Gates is torn between his desire to uphold the law and his lust for revenge. But Gates' older brother will not be satisfied until every member of the Chicago mob is dead.

programme.title: No Country For Old Men, (2007, Crime)
programme.desc: Winner of four Academy Awards, including Best Picture, filmmakers Joel and Ethan Coen (FARGO) bring to the screen a thrilling bestseller in which a crime-scene's irresistible stolen loot sets forth an unstoppable chain reaction of violence.

programme.title: Bound, (1995, Thriller)
programme.desc: Caesar’s a guy who launders money for the mob. What’s the last thing that would come between a sleazy wise guy like Caesar and that money? A couple of women with brains to die for and bodies to match.

programme.title: The Big Hit, (1998, Action)
programme.desc: Lou Diamond Phillips, Mark Wahlberg, Christina Applegate, Antonio Sabato Jr. and Lela Rochon star in this story of a hitman who kidnaps the teenage child of his boss.

programme.title: Face/Off, (1997, Action)
programme.desc: As a result of a new medical technique, an agent is able to surgically take on the identical appearance of a criminal in order to take down his terrorist organization.

programme.title: Bound, (1995, Thriller)
programme.desc: Caesar’s a guy who launders money for the mob. What’s the last thing that would come between a sleazy wise guy like Caesar and that money? A couple of women with brains to die for and bodies to match.

programme.title: Days of Thunder, (1990, Action)
programme.desc: Discovered by businessman Tim Daland, Cole is teamed with legendary crew chief and car-builder Harry Hogge to race for the Winston Cup at the Daytona 500. A crash nearly ends Cole’s career and he must turn to a beautiful doctor to regain his nerve.

programme.title: The Firm, (1993, Thriller)
programme.desc: Mitch joins a prosperous Memphis firm that affords Mitch and his wife an affluent lifestyle beyond their wildest dreams. But when FBI agents confront him with evidence of corruption and murder within the firm, Mitch sets out to find the truth.

programme.title: Flight of the Intruder, (1991, Action)
programme.desc: The target: a missile depot in Hanoi. The plane: the A-6 Intruder, a low-altitude bomber with no defensive weapons. The risk: court-martial at the hands of Commander Camparelli...if they live to return.

programme.title: Days of Thunder, (1990, Action)
programme.desc: Discovered by businessman Tim Daland, Cole is teamed with legendary crew chief and car-builder Harry Hogge to race for the Winston Cup at the Daytona 500. A crash nearly ends Cole’s career and he must turn to a beautiful doctor to regain his nerve.

programme.title: The Godfather Part II, (1974, Crime)
programme.desc: The continuing saga of a young Vito Corleone growing up in Sicily and in New York during the 1910s and then following Michael Corleone in the 1950s as he tries to expand the family business.

programme.title: Mario Puzo's The Godfather Coda: The Death of Michael Corleone, (2020, Crime)
programme.desc: Director/screenwriter Francis Ford Coppola's definitive new edit and restoration of THE GODFATHER: PART III, with remastered picture and sound. Michael Corleone (Pacino) seeks to free his family from crime and find a suitable successor to his empire.

programme.title: The Godfather, (1972, Crime)
programme.desc: A chilling portrait of the Corleone family's rise and near fall from power in America along with balancing the story of the Sicilian clan's ugly crime business in which they are engaged.

programme.title: The Godfather Part II, (1974, Crime)
programme.desc: The continuing saga of a young Vito Corleone growing up in Sicily and in New York during the 1910s and then following Michael Corleone in the 1950s as he tries to expand the family business.

programme.title: Mario Puzo's The Godfather Coda: The Death of Michael Corleone, (2020, Crime)
programme.desc: Director/screenwriter Francis Ford Coppola's definitive new edit and restoration of THE GODFATHER: PART III, with remastered picture and sound. Michael Corleone (Pacino) seeks to free his family from crime and find a suitable successor to his empire.

programme.title: Midnight Cowboy, (1969, Drama)
programme.desc: This Academy Award-winning Best Picture stars Dustin Hoffman and Jon Voight in standout, Oscar-nominated performances as a con man and a Texas hustler trying to survive on the tough streets of New York. The legendary John Schlesinger directs.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: The second duel of the Fortune Cup is about to get under way as the mysterious duelist known as the Black Rose finds herself having to face off against a medieval menace named Sir Randsborg.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With the first Turbo Duel of the Fortune Cup set to start, a surprise guest forces Yusei's competition to take an unexpected pit stop.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Director Goodwin enlists the hypnotic powers of the Professor to expose Luna as a Signer and uncover the secrets she unknowingly knows of the Duel Monsters Spirit World.
programme.sub-title: Return to the Spirit World, Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As the battle between the Professor and Luna continues, Luna looks to keep a promise she made to protect the Duel Monsters Spirit World, but in order for her to succeed, she must first break free of the hypnotic hold the Professor has on her.
programme.sub-title: Return to the Spirit World, Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: The semifinals of the Fortune Cup are about to begin, and the first match of day two features Yusei going toe-to-toe with the tower of power - Greiger!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With no cards left in his hand and his life points about to get blasted by Greiger, Yusei has one draw left to take down this tower of power to keep in the hunt to duel Jack in the championship round.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: In the second battle of the semifinals, Akiza squares off against the professional profiler Commander Koda, but with her tournament life on the line, can Akiza outplay an opponent who claims to know her every move?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With the Fortune Cup Finale one win away, Yusei and Akiza get set to battle it out as Director Goodwin anxiously awaits the final Signer to reveal their Mark of the Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As the back-and-forth battle between Akiza and Yusei rages on, Yusei is forced to unleash his mighty Stardust Dragon in order to stop Akiza's grisly garden from squeezing his life points into submission.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With the Fortune Cup Finale about to kick into overdrive, Jack decides to clear the air and reveal the truth behind his escape from the Satellite Sector.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With the finish line of the Fortune Cup fast approaching, Yusei and Jack find themselves on a collision course with destiny as they race to unlock the mystery behind the Crimson Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: After defeating Jack to win the Fortune Cup Finale, Yusei is challenged to a Shadow Duel by an underground duelist whose mind has been taken over by the Dark Signers.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As the battle between Yusei and his robed rival rages on, Yusei must rely on his deck if he plans to survive this Shadow Duel and uncover the truth behind the Dark Signers sinister scheme to destroy the Satellite Sector.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: After agreeing to help Yusei meet with Director Goodwin, Officer Trudge unknowingly becomes one of the Dark Signers' drones and challenges a wounded Jack Atlas to a Shadow Duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Hoping to gain Yusei's trust, Director Goodwin decides to share with him the secrets behind the origin of the Satellite Sector and the ongoing war between Signer and Dark Signer.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: After returning to the Satellite Sector, Yusei meets up with his old friend Crow and soon finds himself in a tag team Turbo Duel with Sector Security.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Yusei and Crow set off to confront the Dark Signers in an effort to stop them from destroying the Satellite Sector.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: In an effort to save the Satellite Sector from being destroyed, Yusei agrees to face off against a former friend turned Dark Signer in a Shadow Duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With his life points on the line, Yusei confronts his former friend Kalin about their past in an effort to stop him from awakening the Army of Shadows.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: The safety of the world hangs in the balance as Yusei tries to figure out a way to outduel and outmaneuver the unstoppable power of Kalin's dark deck.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Leo is forced to take part in an extrasensory examination with the leader of the Arcadia Movement. Can Leo pass this pop quiz, or will this psychic showdown with Sayer leave Leo locked up forever?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With Lazar's creepy clowns about to crack Crow's defense, Crow hatches a plan to lull his opponent into a false sense of security so that his feathered friends can swoop in and swipe the last of Lazar's life points.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Yusei gets caught up in a web of lies after agreeing to square off against Roman, the leader of the Dark Signers.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With the safety of his friends literally hanging in the balance, Yusei must figure out a way to squash Roman's Earthbound Immortal before it sends him and his pals to the Netherworld forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Luna gears up to face Devack in a Shadow Duel, but before the first card can be thrown, Luna is transported back to the Spirit World, leaving her pint-sized brother Leo the tall task of taking down this Dark Signer.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As Luna searches the Spirit World for a way to free Ancient Fairy Dragon from her stone prison, Leo searches his deck for a card combo that will help him defeat Devack and his army of apes.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Luna and her new found friend Torunka hatch a plan to free Regulus from King Zeman's minus curse. Meanwhile, back in the Satellite Sector, Leo calls upon his Power Tool Dragon to help him dismantle Devack's dark deck.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: When Luna's plan to free Ancient Fairy Dragon falls apart, Regulus must come to her rescue in order to save her and the Spirit World from Zeman's minus curse.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Carly sets out hoping to uncover the mystery behind the Crimson Dragon, but after digging up some damaging dirt on the Arcadia Movement, she soon finds herself squaring off in a psychic duel with Sayer.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Sayer signs up for a Shadow Duel against a Dark Signer who's out for revenge while Akiza agrees to battle a dark and sinister supermodel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As the Dark Signer double duel draws to a climactic close, Carly and Misty unfold a catastrophic card combo that could send Akiza and Sayer to the Netherworld forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: After Akiza falls into a state of unconsciousness, her father turns to Yusei in a last ditch effort to wake his beloved daughter from her catatonic condition.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As the battle between Signers presses on, Yusei turns to his trusty Stardust Dragon in an effort to keep the power of Akiza's Black Rose Dragon at bay.

programme.title: Luffy continues to battle Fake-mingo, but keeps accidentally battling Bellamy instead. Meanwhile the tide of battle turns against Law as painful scars from the past resurface. And Zoro gets unexpected help in his battle with Pica.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: An Intense Battle! Law vs. Doflamingo!

programme.title: Bellamy escapes Doflamingo's control, but it might be too late. His long history with Doflamingo unfolds and leads to an inglorious end. Meanwhile, Hajrudin has been beaten down, but a fire still burns in him to pay back the favor he owes!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Decisive Battle Against the Executives! Proud Hajrudin!

programme.title: Lao G and Don Chinjao duke it out as each brings their most devastating attacks to the battle. But a misunderstanding caused by Baby 5 has Sai and Don Chinjao distracted - are they distracted enough for Lao G to gain the upper hand?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Battle of Love! The New Leader Sai vs. Baby 5!

programme.title: Law is at the whim of Doflamingo and Trebol, while Luffy still has to deal with Bellamy, who fights to keep his honor even after being released by Doflamingo! Meanwhile, Gladius is about to detonate the ground around Cavendish and Bartolomeo!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Man's Pride! Bellamy's Last Charge!

programme.title: A mysterious force that resembles Cavendish menaces the battlefield - but while it appears to help Bartolomeo and the others at first, it sets its sights on Robin! Meanwhile, the deeply-wounded Ideo sees Dellinger's horrible true nature!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Strong Wind and a Surge! Hakuba vs. Dellinger!

programme.title: Bartolomeo is in a neck-and-neck battle against Gladius to save Robin, and is faced with an impossible dilemma. With all his options leading to their defeat, can his cunning ploy save the day? Meanwhile, Robin is face to face with Cavendish.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Princess Mansherry's amazing power - to heal living beings completely - is in the hands of the Donquixote executive. If she is able to heal all the executives who've gone down in battle - the Straw Hats and their allies stand no chance!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Señor Pink and Franky continue their knock-down, drag-out, manly fight. As both of them are pushed to their limits, we learn Señor's tragic past! Meanwhile, Princess Mansherry's rescue hits a snag as she stubbornly refuses to leave!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Manly Duel! Señor's Elegy of Love!

programme.title: Franky and Señor Pink end their harrowing duel in a manly way - but victory knocks the wind out of even the winner's sails! Meanwhile, Diamante and Kyros struggle desperately on the Sunflower Field, each demonstrating their extreme prowess.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Stardust of Death! Diamante's Storm of Vicious Attacks!

programme.title: Kyros, unbowed by Diamante's vicious attacks, fights back with the anger and retribution of all of Dressrosa in order to fulfill his promise to protect Rebecca. If he is successful, only a few executives will remain.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Pica loses his temper and turns his full wrath against King Riku, whom he hopes to destroy, ending the revolution against Doflamingo. Meanwhile, Zoro, who has been distracted by Pica and drawn far from the battle, has to hatch a plan to save the king!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Moving Across the Ground! The Giant Statue Pica's Surprise Maneuver!

programme.title: With the lives of King Riku, Usopp, and the others on the old King's Plateau in the balance, Zoro must dig deep and discover a powerful technique to counter Pica's near-unstoppable onslaught. Meanwhile, King Riku ponders what it means to be a good king.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Decisive Battle in Midair! Zoro's New Special Secret Technique Blasts!

programme.title: Zoro finishes off Pica, and those below his crumbling body rush to find shelter. Meanwhile, the Tontattas finish up demolishing the SMILE Factory, and Luffy's hand is forced in his duel with Bellamy!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Taking down Bellamy only enrages Luffy in his fight against Doflamingo, his anger multiplying when he finds Law's lifeless body! Meanwhile, Doflamingo takes the next step to end the game he started, which will endanger everybody in Dressrosa!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: The Birdcage draws tighter and tighter around Dressrosa, threatening to destroy all life on the island kingdom! Meanwhile, Doflamingo stands down Luffy for a final confrontation, but a surprising twist shocks everyone on the top of the Royal Palace!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Blade of Tenacity! The Gamma Knife Counterattack!

programme.title: Law's attack proves powerful - but Doflamingo's power has depths which he and Luffy haven't bargained for. When Doflamingo makes his counterattack, Luffy stares him down with an amazing power.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Collision of Haki! Luffy vs. Doflamingo!

programme.title: Trebol's wrath is fully inflamed as Law summons enough energy to speak, denouncing the Doflamingo Family executives as pawns in Doflamingo's game. But Law gathers enough energy to do more than just speak out.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Unassailable! The Stunning Secret of Trebol!

programme.title: Cavendish has to make a difficult decision when the severely wounded Law begs him to be left behind. Meanwhile, seeing even his Second Gear or Third Gear attacks aren't working against Doflamingo, Luffy decides to use his ultimate technique!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Anger Erupts! I Will Take Everything upon Myself!

programme.title: Luffy and Doflamingo duke it out while the Birdcage tightens its grip on Dressrosa! Zoro sets off with a plan to stop it from slicing apart the country, while Luffy's Fourth Gear proves quite potent against Doflamingo!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: The Birdcage continues its merciless constriction, sending the residents of Dressrosa fleeing towards the center of the island, while King Riku calls out to his people: Survive long enough for Luffy to vanquish the last of the royal family.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Fourth Gear gives Luffy the power he needs to head off Doflamingo at every strike! But the energy required to keep Fourth Gear going starts to take a toll on Luffy. Will he have enough left to finish the job?
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Bounce-man's power has drained Luffy, leaving him in need of a rest before he can reuse his Haki, but luckily the gladiators from the Colosseum have come around and are focusing on taking down Doflamingo! Sabo steps in at a crucial moment.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Flame Dragon King! Protect Luffy's Life!

programme.title: With Luffy and so many of the Straw Hats' allies incapacitated, victory seems inevitable for Doflamingo - but the compassion of Mansherry may be enough to turn the tide and renew their hope - to stop the Birdcage!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: With just over a minute to spare, everyone in Dressrosa turns their efforts towards slowing down the Birdcage as it squeezes the life out of the country! Meanwhile, Viola seeks Doflamingo out herself, for a shocking confrontation!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: As Long as We Breathe! Stop the Deadly Birdcage!

programme.title: Only a bit more time remains before Luffy returns to the scene! But as time slips by, those who had been roused by Princess Mansherry's powers begin to falter! Meanwhile, Rebecca, under the control of Doflamingo, is about to attack Viola!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Dead or Alive! A Fateful Countdown!

programme.title: Luffy regains enough Haki to face off against Doflamingo, but his health is still poor. With the Birdcage closing in, is there a technique left in his repertoire that is strong enough to take down Doflamingo?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Attack on a Celestial! Luffy's King Kong Gun of Anger!

programme.title: With Doflamingo thoroughly quashed and the Birdcage collapsing, the people of Dressrosa shed tears of joy remembering the hardships they've endured, and the actions taken by Luffy and the others to free them.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Jesus Burgess of the Blackbeard Pirates tries to agitate Sabo, mocking Ace's final words in order to unsettle him enough that he can try to steal the Flare-Flare Fruit! Meanwhile, people of Dressrosa beg King Riku to resume the crown.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Unheard-of! Admiral Fujitora’s Surprising Decision!

programme.title: Repercussions of Doflamingo's defeat reverberate around the world! Fujitora's actions put the Navy in a tight spot, and the "Worst Generation" beings to stir into action!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Sending a Shock Wave! The Worst Generation Goes Into Action!

programme.title: The combatants in the battle for Dressrosa can finally begin to recoup, but those who stay awake are treated to the story of how Sabo joined the Revolutionary Army!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Birth of the Legend! The Adventures of the Revolutionary Warrior Sabo!

programme.title: Sabo recounts his surprising reunion with Luffy at the Colosseum as the Straw Hats and the others continue to recoup. Meanwhile, Fujitora gambles on how to make his next move - and the odds are in Luffy's favor!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Brothers' Bond! The Untold Story Behind Luffy and Sabo's Reunion!

programme.title: As Sabo departs, our attention shifts to the other Straw Hats waging a fierce battle on a mysterious island. And a new drama is set into motion as ill portents fall from the sky!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Strongest Creature! One of the Four Emperors - Kaido, King of the Beasts!

programme.title: As Luffy and the others begin to come to their senses, major players in the Navy arrive to search Dressrosa for the Straw Hats! Also, Rebecca's history is whitewashed with a fake cover story - but why?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Fujitora Takes Action! The Complete Siege of the Straw Hats!

programme.title: xXx: State of the Union, (2005, Espionage Action)
programme.desc: Darius Stone is a thrill-seeking troublemaker whose criminal record and extreme sports obsession make him the perfect candidate to be the newest xXx agent. He must save the U.S. government from a conspiracy led by Secretary of Defense George Deckert.

programme.title: Source Code, (2011, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Jake Gyllenhaal stars in this action thriller about a man who awakens in another man’s body to discover only he has the ability to stop a terrorist attack on a commuter train.

programme.title: Snowpiercer, (2014, Action)
programme.desc: After a failed global-warming experiment, a post-apocalyptic Ice Age has killed off nearly all life on the planet.

programme.title: Minority Report, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: In the future, a division of the police department has the technology to arrest killers before they commit crimes; however, the tables turn on one of the cops working within the division.

programme.title: The Fifth Element, (1997, Action)
programme.desc: Bruce Willis, Milla Jovovich, and Gary Oldman star in acclaimed director Luc Besson's outrageous sci-fi adventure, an extravagantly styled tale of good against evil set in an unbelievable twenty-third century world.

programme.title: The 6th Day, (2000, Action)
programme.desc: In the very near future, cattle, fish, and even the family pet can be cloned. But cloning humans is illegal - that is, until family man Adam Gibson comes home from work one day to find a clone has replaced him. Rating: PG-13

programme.title: Attack the Block, (2011, Science fiction)
programme.desc: ATTACK THE BLOCK is a fast, funny, frightening action adventure movie that pits a teen street gang against an invasion of savage alien monsters. It turns a crazy mix of tough street kids into a team of kick ass heroes.

programme.title: Snowpiercer, (2014, Action)
programme.desc: After a failed global-warming experiment, a post-apocalyptic Ice Age has killed off nearly all life on the planet.

programme.title: Valdez Is Coming, (1971, Western)
programme.desc: In this rousing Western, when a greedy rancher causes the death of an innocent man, former sheriff Bob Valdez (Burt Lancaster) orders him to provide financial support for the widow. But when he refuses, Valdez vows to exact justice at any cost!

programme.title: Gunsight Ridge, (1957, Western)
programme.desc: Stage line agent investigates a series of robberies by taking the job of a deputy sheriff in a border Arizona town.

programme.title: Fort Massacre, (1958, Western)
programme.desc: Joel McCrea gives a compelling performance as a cavalry sergeant apparently leading his men to safety, but actually slowly going mad in an insane attempt to avenge an Indian massacre.

programme.title: Warlock, (1959, Western)
programme.desc: An ex-outlaw (Richard Widmark) divides and challenges a quick-draw lawman (Henry Fonda) and his sidekick (Anthony Quinn).

programme.title: The Toughest Gun In Tombstone, (1958, Western)
programme.desc: In lawless 1880s Arizona, an undercover captain infiltrates the West's most notorious outlaw gang. Building a ruthless reputation while hiding his true identity, he plays a deadly game of deception to bring down the brutal crew of killers.

programme.title: Support Your Local Sheriff!, (1969, Western)
programme.desc: James Garner stars in this rollicking western spoof that has him taking on the job of a frontier town sheriff who must fend off villains (led by Walter Brennen) from every direction...all without breaking a sweat or dirtying his shiny black boots!

programme.title: Support Your Local Gunfighter, (1971, Western)
programme.desc: James Garner is back in the saddle again as hustler Latigo Smith whose latest con is passing off cowhand Jug (Jack Elam) as the dreaded gunman Swifty Morgan. But when the real Swifty shows up, the Wild West is going to get a whole lot wackier!

programme.title: Gun The Man Down, (1956, Western)
programme.desc: When an outlaw is shot during a heist and left for dead by his partners - who take his money and his woman - he sets out to track them down. And when he catches up with them, he’ll have to rely on his wits...as much as the loaded gun in his holster!

programme.title: Cariboo Trail, (1950, Western)
programme.desc: Montanans Jim Redfern and Mike Evans head into Canada's British Columbia via the Cariboo Trail intent to raise cattle and dig for gold but find trouble instead.

programme.title: Rachel Getting Married, (2008, Drama)
programme.desc: When Kym, returns to the Buchman family home for the wedding of her sister Rachel, she brings a long history of personal crises, family conflict, and tragedy along with her. Rated -R

programme.title: Ella Enchanted, (2004, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Oscar-winner Anne Hathaway stars in an unforgettable, modern fairy tale in which a girl's given the gift of obedience by her Fairy Godmother. An amazing, magical adventure bursting with colorful characters, music, wit, and whimsy.

programme.title: Kinky Boots, (2005, Comedy)
programme.desc: To save his family's shoe business from imminent bankruptcy, young Charlie Price turns to an unlikely new creative consultant: a fabulous drag queen whose creative style and wild designs are a breath of fresh air in the stuffy old factory.

programme.title: Hot Rod, (2007, Screwball)
programme.desc: A comedy about a stunt man who’s never successfully landed a jump without wiping out and his attempt to master the biggest stunt of his life.

programme.title: The Longest Yard, (2005, Comedy)
programme.desc: The story of a pro quarterback and former college champion and coach are asked to put together a football team of inmates to take on the guards while doing their time in prison.

programme.title: Get Rich or Die Tryin', (2005, Musical)

programme.title: Food Wars!

programme.title: The Demon Girl Next Door

programme.title: The Demon Girl Next Door

programme.title: Linha de Ação, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. O prefeito contrata um ex-policial para investigar quem é o amante de sua esposa. Apesar de suas antigas discordâncias, ele aceita a tarefa, mas logo descobre as reais intenções por trás da investigação encomendada. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Catherine Zeta-Jones, Mark Wahlberg, Russell Crowe Diretor: Allen Hughes

programme.desc: 2020. As vidas dos policiais de Nova York colidem em histórias que se chocam em conflitos de raça, poder, derrotas e traição. programme.title: O Guardião, (2010)
programme.desc: 2010. Um policial de Los Angeles voa para o Novo México para trabalhar como guarda-costas para a filha de um poderoso empresário. Quando gangsters a sequestram, ele os procura para resgatá-la e protegê-la. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Steven Seagal, Liezl Carstens, Arron Shiver Diretor: Keoni Waxman

programme.title: Fogo contra Fogo, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Um bombeiro fora de serviço testemunha um assassinato nas mãos de uma gangue de gangsters. Ele entra no programa de proteção a testemunhas até depor, mas não pode se esconder por muito tempo da gangue, então decide agir por conta própria. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Josh Duhamel, Bruce Willis, Rosario Dawson Diretor: David Barrett

programme.title: Alvo Duplo, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. programme.title: O Corvo III A Salvação, (2000)
programme.desc: 2000. Alex Corvis é um jovem injustamente condenado à cadeira elétrica pelo brutal assassinato de Lauren, sua namorada. Pelo poder mágico do corvo, Corvis retorna do mundo dos mortos para vingar a morte de Lauren e limpar seu nome. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Kirsten Dunst, Eric Mabius, Jodi Lyn O'Keefe, William Atherton, Grant Shaud, Bruce McCarty, Dale Midkiff, Tim DeKay, Walton Goggins, Fred Ward Diretor: Bharat Nalluri

programme.title: Ligadas Pelo Desejo, (1996)
programme.desc: 1996. Corky é uma ex-presidiária durona que convence sua amante, Violet, a executar um esquema para roubar milhões de dinheiro escondido da máfia e colocar a culpa no namorado desonesto de Violet,Caesar. Gêneros: Crime Elenco: Jennifer Tilly, Gina Gershon, Joe Pantoliano, John Ryan, Christopher Meloni Diretor: Lilly Wachowski, Lana Wachowski

programme.title: Matador de Aluguel, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Joe é um detetive, mas também um assassino por encomenda. Quando Chris, um traficante, tem seu estoque roubado pela própria mãe, ele resolve contratar os serviços de 'Killer Joe' para se livrar da morte usando o dinheiro do seguro de vida de sua mãe. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Mcconaughey, Matthew, Hirsch, Emile Diretor: William Friedkin

programme.title: Caminho da Morte, (2016)
programme.desc: 2016. Um ônibus escolar tem seu pneu furado, fazendo com que o motorista procure ajuda em um rancho. Ele, cinco alunos problemáticos, e uma extravagante professora encontram em vez disso, um grupo de criminosos e traficantes que não podem ser descobertos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Robert Forster, Michael Bailey Smith, Holly Elissa, Patrick Johnson, Steven Chase, Steve Daron, Mitch Holleman, Ashley Jackson Diretor: Brian Herzlinger

programme.title: Até o Fim!, (2021)
programme.desc: 2021. O ex-soldado de Operações Especiais Jake Hunter está desesperado para encontrar sua filha desaparecida. Enquanto Jake descobre a terrível verdade em torno do desaparecimento dela, ele parte em uma busca impiedosa por vingança. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Paul Sloan, Richard Dreyfuss, Jake Weber, Taryn Manning, Mike Hatton, Michael Madsen... Diretor: Christian Sesma

programme.title: Acima da Lei, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Um policial se infiltrou em uma rede de distribuição de heroína e se envolve profundamente quando um jovem desertor de drogas deixa sua irmã de cinco anos sob seus cuidados. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Cuba Gooding Jr, Christian Slater, Kim Coates Diretor: Damian Lee

programme.title: Querida Viola, (2014)
programme.desc: 2014. Katie é uma escritora tímida que assume o controle de uma coluna popular chamada "Dear Viola". Um dia ele encontra uma carta de um homem que não consegue superar a morte de sua esposa. Logo o relacionamento deles atrairá a atenção de todos. Gêneros: Romance Elenco: Sheila McCarthy, Neil Crone, Kellie Martin, Jefferson Brown, Jackie Richardson, Kira Gelineau, Arnold Pinnock, Adamo Ruggiero, Robinne Fanfair, Stephen Park Diretor: Laurie Lynd

programme.title: Um Natal de Descobertas, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. Um Natal de Descobertas, apresenta Candace Cameron Bure como Dra. Lauren Brunell que aceita uma vaga no Alasca após perder ambos seu namorado e uma bolsa de cirurgia de prestígio, apenas para descobrir que é um minúsculo hospital em uma pequena cidade. Gêneros: Romance Elenco: Nikki Deloach, Luke Macfarlane, Maureen McCormick, Cynthia Gibb, Richard Karn Diretor: Sam Irvin

programme.title: Apenas Uma Noite, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. História de amor, traição e ciúme. Um casal em Nova York tem que se separar, por uma noite, devido a uma viagem de negócios que o marido tem que fazer com uma atraente colega de trabalho. Gêneros: Romance Elenco: Keira Knightley, Sam Worthington, Guillaume Canet Diretor: Massy Tadjedin

programme.title: À Prova de Fogo, (2009)
programme.desc: 2009. No trabalho o Capitão Caleb vive pelo velho ditado dos bombeiros: Nunca deixe o seu companheiro para trás. Em casa, ele vive pelas próprias regras. Agora Caleb terá o seu trabalho mais árduo, resgatar o coração de sua esposa. Gêneros: Romance Elenco: Kirk Cameron, Erin Bethea Diretor: Alex Kendrick

programme.title: A Força do Destino, (1982)
programme.desc: 1982. O solitário Zack Mayo (Richard Gere) entra na Escola de Oficiais para se tornar piloto da Marinha e em treze semanas torturantes, ele aprende a importância da disciplina, do amor e da amizade. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Richard Gere, Debra Winger, Louis Gossett, David Keith, Lisa Eilbacher, Lisa Blount, Robert Loggia, Harold Sylvester, David Caruso, Grace Zabriskie Diretor: Taylor Hackford

programme.title: Antes que Termine o Dia, (2004)
programme.desc: 2004. Se você tivesse um dia mais com a garota dos seus sonhos, o que você faria? Esse é o problema enfrentado por Ian, que perde a bela violinista Samantha em um acidente de carro, então acorda e descobre que tem outra chance. programme.title: Pronta para Amar, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Marley Corbett é uma jovem divertida com medo de se entregar completamente a um relacionamento. Ela tenta usar o humor para impedir que os problemas se agravem, mas é pega de surpresa quando descobre que está com uma doença grave. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Kate Hudson, Gael García Bernal, Kathy Bates Diretor: Nicole Kassell

programme.title: Art of Falling In Love, (2019)
programme.desc: 2019. Uma artista que pinta um mural em uma nova ala hospitalar se apaixona pelo arquiteto do projeto, mas teme que ele não queira estar com ela se ela revelar a história infeliz por trás de sua lista secreta de coisas para fazer. Gêneros: Romance Elenco: Michael Brown, Andrew Anthony, Bobby Daniels, Josh Dean, Kelly Bishop, Kimberly Sue Murray, Lily Gao Diretor: Justin G. Dycki

programme.desc: 2013. Abbie e Robert são amigos com muita coisa em comum: jovens, têm uma visão não-convencional da vida, inteligentes, impulsivos e um terrível azar no amor. programme.title: O Ataque do Tubarão de 6 Cabeças, (2018)

programme.title: Os Sobreviventes, (2014)
programme.desc: 2014. Quando a jovem Kate Mitra encontra um planeta habitável para o resto da humanidade, ela e sua tripulação fazem um teste, mas uma chuva de meteoros atinge a nave e eles são forçados a pousar em um local desconhecido. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: O Legado de Osiris, (2017)
programme.desc: 2017. programme.title: O Som do Trovão, (2003)
programme.desc: 2003. No ano de 2055, o esporte predileto dos ricos é viajar no tempo para caçar dinossauros. A diversão tem apenas uma regra: é proibido trazer do passado qualquer lembrancinha, viva ou morta, já que isto geraria uma série de reações que modificaria o presente Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Heike Makatsch, Armin Rohde, David Oyelowo, Wilfried Hochholdinger, Edward Burns, Jemima Rooper, Ben Kingsley, August Zirner, Catherine McCormack, Alv... Diretor: Peter Hyams

programme.desc: 1982. programme.title: O Rei da Montanha, (1970)

programme.title: O Ataque Dos Donuts Assassinos, (2017)

programme.desc: 1970. Depois de cinco anos, Leonardo reencontra Rebeca e ela quer ver os filhos; Leo diz a Agustina que Maria Lúcia é filha de Virginia; Leonardo liga para Agustina e conta que encontrou a irmã. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Amor Secreto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Agustina perde a sanidade após a notícia que Leonardo lhe deu; um agente aparece na casa de Trindade para notificar Maria Lúcia; Irene fica inquieta com a chegada de Leonardo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Amor Secreto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Leonardo se encontra com Irene e tenta explicar a situação para ela; Trinidad pergunta a María Lucía se ela teve algo a ver com Leo; Rebeca se reencontra com seus filhos, mudando assim todo o rumo da família. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Amor Secreto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Todos ficam perplexos com a chegada de Rebeca; Carlos Ernesto duvida de Alejandra e acredita que ela está por trás da chegada de Rebeca. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Amor secreto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Maribel diz a Carlos Ernesto que a atitude de Rodrigo e Rebeca é muito suspeita; Felipe e Paula finalmente passam a noite juntos; Alejandra tira sarro de Irene e seu casamento; Leonardo tenta contar a verdade a Rebeca, mas ela desmaia. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Amor Secreto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após se recuperar do desmaio, Rebeca pede a Leonardo que não a deixe; Irene sai de casa e procura Felipe; Leonardo vai à casa de Trinidad para procurar Irene; Rebeca convoca uma coletiva de imprensa. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Sob o Domínio dos Robôs, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A Terra foi conquistada por Robôs de uma galáxia distante. Os sobreviventes estão confinados em suas casas tentando sobreviver a ameaça constante. Mas, uma gangue de adolescentes pode ser a única esperança. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Inimaginável, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em um futuro apocalíptico, a Suécia enfrenta um misterioso ataque, e Alex se vê obrigado a voltar para sua terra natal. Ali, ele deve lidar com seu pai e também reencontrar seu amor de juventude, Anna. Gêneros: Entertainment

1970. Um humilde trabalhador é chamado para o futuro por um misterioso sinal de rádio. Ele deixa a esposa doente para embarcar em uma jornada que o força a enfrentar seus medos na tentativa de mudar o tecido da realidade e salvar a humanidade. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Cloud Atlas, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Várias histórias são desenroladas em diferentes linhas de tempo, mas mesmo sendo independentes e se desenvolvendo ao longo de cinco séculos, todas estão relacionadas e algumas têm impacto sobre outras, entrelaçando drama, mistério, ação e amor. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Busca Alucinante, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Mary vai buscar seu namorado no hospital após uma cirurgia, mas não o encontra. Nem o administrador, nem a polícia têm registro dele. Ela é considerada louca e agora precisa encontrar seu namorado sozinha. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: As Origens do Universo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O mundo que nos rodeia contém muitos sistemas complexos que funcionam perfeitamente juntos. Durante muitos anos, houve um debate acalorado entre evolução e criação, com a questão central de tudo: a Terra foi criada ou surgiu por conta própria. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Double Dragon, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um arqueólogo chamado Dr. Linquist leva os irmãos Lee a um antigo Dragon Dojo subterrâneo, onde eles descobrem poderosos artefatos. Lá, também descobrem um ser antigo, conhecido como Shadow Khan. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: A Última Peça, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Paula organiza uma festa surpresa para seu irmão e, quando está prestes a terminar de decorar a casa com muitos dinossauros, descobre que um dos brinquedos veio faltando uma peça. Para recuperá-la, ela tem que enfrentar o malvado dono da loja. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Duelo Final, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Rebecca achou que finalmente havia se livrado do mundo secreto do combate ilegal. Agora, com sua irmã em perigo, ela deve relutantemente retornar à vida que abandonou para salvar sua família e confrontar o líder enlouquecido do clube de luta. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Massacre da Família Manson, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em 1992, a cantora de rock Margot Lavigne se muda para a casa em que a Família Manson assassinou a atriz Sharon Tate. Não demora muito para a vida da cantora e de seus companheiros de banda se transformar em um pesadelo infernal. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Ação Judicial, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Mulher pede ao ex-marido, um advogado renomado, que defenda seu irmão criminoso, acusado de matar um promotor público. Mas o processo esconde complicações e ele vai precisar de muito mais do que só suas habilidades jurídicas para ganhar o caso. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Jovem Viking, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Halvdan não é o tipo perfeito de viking, pois manca e é considerado pelas outras crianças um estranho solitário e sem amigos. Um dia, durante suas excursões solitárias ao rio, ele encontra Meia, a filha corajosa do rei. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Três Ladrões e um Bebê, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O compulsivo jogador Slipper vê o sequestro do neto de um magnata como a salvação de suas dívidas. Quando, com seu senhorio e o oportunista Octopus, sequestram BB, sem saber, frustram os planos do crime organizado, que também está atrás da criança. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Todos os Caminhos Levam a Roma, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Maggie embarca em uma viagem para Itália, com Summer, sua filha adolescente. Mas ao chegar lá, Summer foge roubando o carro da mãe. Maggie contará com a ajuda de um ex-namorado para encontrar a filha. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Delicadeza do Amor, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma bela jovem perde o marido em um terrível acidente. Inconsolável, ela decide mergulhar de cabeça no trabalho, se dedicando de forma integral. No entanto, um beijo sem motivo aparente em um colega muda essa situação. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Doutor da Felicidade, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Doutor Knock é um ex-bandido que se tornou um médico e chega à pequena aldeia de Saint-Maurice para fazer os moradores acreditarem que não são saudáveis e, assim, poder exercer sua profissão de forma lucrativa. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Um Homem Comum, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um criminoso de guerra procurado mundo afora conhece uma empregada e um estranho relacionamento surge entre eles. Quando a calmaria parece estabelecida na vida dele, ela descobre que há uma recompensa milionária para quem souber onde o fugitivo está. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Assassinos Anônimos, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A tensão está insuportável dentro da Assassinos Anônimos, um grupo de apoio para matadores, quando todos estão tentando descobrir qual deles está por trás de um atentado contra um importante senador. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Agente Infiltrada, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma espiã da inteligência de Israel se infiltra no programa nuclear iraniano. Quando ela desaparece sem deixar pistas, aos poucos é revelada uma teia de intrigas e sedução. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Stretch, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Stretch é um chofer de limusine em Los Angeles que se esforça para pagar suas dívidas e que tenta, sem sucesso, superar seu vício no jogo e na cocaína, deixar suas expectativas como ator e um romance falido para trás. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Garota em Chamas - Rebelião, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Ela perdeu a memória ainda jovem, mas essas lembranças escondem segredos sombrios. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Jovens e Rebeldes, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Como a maioria dos adolescentes, Culain, Enica, Julian e Sego devem lidar com pressões de outros jovens, bullying, problemas com os pais e, claro, amores não correspondidos. Mas eles também vivem sob o domínio opressivo do Império Romano. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: De Volta ao Fundo do Mar, (1970)

Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T01E02

programme.title: 1998. Cartman descobre a verdadeira identidade do seu pai. Uma tempestade de neve prende os garotos no hospital. A equipe do America’s Most Wanted está na cidade. A equipe e os moradores ficam isolados e consideram o canibalismo. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.sub-title: A Mãe do Cartman Continua Sendo uma Vaca
programme.desc: South Park - T02E02

programme.title: 1998. Os rapazes estão em um dia de passeio pelo planetário e um dos funcionários lava o cérebro deles com efeitos visuais para que eles queiram voltar para lá. programme.sub-title: Roger Ebert deveria demitir os alimentos gordurosos

programme.title: 2000. Os rapazes precisam de dinheiro para investir em videogames. Então eles resolvem roubar dentes, já que a fada dos dentes paga por isso. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T04E02

programme.title: 2000. Cartman acha que é muito maduro para sair com Stan, Kyle e Kenny, e decide buscar novos amigos na internet, mas termina se metendo em vários problemas com pedófilos. Enquanto isso, Kenny tenta evitar que seus pais tenham outro filho. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.sub-title: Cartman entra para a ASNAMB (Associação De Sósias Norte-Americanos Do Marlon Brando)
programme.desc: South Park - T04E06

programme.title: 2000. Todos acham que Cartman está muito gordo e decidem enviá-lo a um "Acampamento de Gordos" para perder peso. Por outro lado, Kenny está topando fazer qualquer coisa por dinheiro, e isso o leva às mais diversas insanidades. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T04E15

programme.title: 2001. Scott Tenorman é um rapaz do oitavo ano que engana Cartman ao vender seus pentelhos. Agora, ele fará o que for preciso para recuperar o seu dinheiro. Participação especial: Radiohead. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T05E01

programme.title: 2001. Cartman recebe como herança de sua avó um milhão de dólares e decide cumprir seu maior sonho: comprar um parque de diversão somente para ele, no qual ele não precisa fazer fila para subir nos brinquedos, já que ninguém mais pode entrar. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T05E06

programme.title: 2003. Kyle diz que, como presente de aniversário, sua mãe levará ele e três amigos para a Casa Bonita. A alegria de Cartman acaba quando Kyle decide convidar Stan, Kenny e Butters. Agora Butters precisa "desaparecer". Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T07E11

programme.title: 2004. Cartman se fantasia de um robô chamado "Genial-O 4000" e Butters acredita que ele de fato é um robô. Porém, a piada de Cartman se transforma em um pesadelo quando ele descobre que Butters tem um vídeo dele fantasiado de Britney Spears. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T08E02

programme.title: 2004. Cartman estava tentando voar, mas o máximo que conseguiu foi um golpe na cabeça e isso fez com que ele ficasse dois dias em coma. A polícia local assume que agora Cartman tem poderes psíquicos e que pode resolver casos extraordinários. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T08E13

programme.title: 2005. Os meninos ficam com raiva de Cartman quando ele come a parte mais gostosa das asas de frango, e decidem ignorá-lo. Todos começam a fazer o mesmo. Ao ser ignorado por todos, ele começa a pensar que está morto e que agora é um fantasma. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T09E06

programme.title: 2005. Cartman promove o ódio na escola contra os meninos com cabelo vermelho, sardas e pele pálida, dizendo que eles não tem alma e não sobrevivem ao sol. programme.desc: South Park - T09E11

programme.title: 2006. Al Gore visita a escola de South Park e tenta convencer Stan, Kyle, Cartman e Kenny para sair e caçar o perigoso homem-urso-porco. Ao ajudá-lo nesta missão, os rapazes acabam ficando presos em uma caverna. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T10E06

programme.title: 2006. A mãe do Cartman quer encontrar uma maneira de controlar o seu filho. Ela busca ajuda em alguns programas de televisão, mas sem muito sucesso. Eis que surge César Millan, um adestrador de cães que aceita o desafio. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T10E07

programme.title: 2006. O senhor Garrison precisa explicar a Teoria da Evolução em aula, mesmo que isso vá totalmente contra os seus valores. Enquanto isso, Cartman mal pode esperar o dia em que lançam o seu novo videogame preferido. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T10E12

programme.title: 2006. Cartman resolve congelar a si mesmo em uma tentativa desesperada de suportar a espera do lançamento do novo Nintendo Wii. Ele acaba despertando apenas 500 anos mais tarde, em um futuro nada agradável, e o pior de tudo: sem Nintendo Wii! Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker

programme.title: 1998. A tia Flo está de visita e dá um presente para Stan: um peixe medonho. Com o tempo, começam a aparecer alguns cadáveres por aí, e a mãe de Stan tenta fingir que não tem nada a ver. programme.desc: South Park - T02E15

programme.title: 1999. Vários habitantes de South Park estão ficando cada vez mais furiosos, e sem alguma razão aparente. Randy é o principal responsável para descobrir uma solução para este problema. Enquanto isso, Kyle tenta "conseguir uma ereção". Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T03E02

programme.title: 1999. Stan tem que ir com os seus pais para uma festa chata repleta dos alunos menos populares do colégio, como Butters, Pip e Dougie. programme.sub-title: Dois caras nus em uma banheira
programme.desc: South Park - T03E08

programme.title: 2002. Já que Butters parece encaixar tão bem com Cartman, Kyle e Stan, seus pais decidem ir com eles para passar um final de semana em Aspen. Ao chegar em Aspen, Stan, que não é nada experiente, se vê forçado a competir contra um campeão de ski. programme.desc: South Park - T06E03

programme.title: 2002. Stan fuma uns cigarros de maconha que uns rapazes mais velhos deixaram e, pela noite, aparece um homem de 32 anos perdido e drogado que diz ser o Stan do futuro. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Adrien Beard, Matt Stone, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T06E16

programme.title: 2003. Um novo aluno mórmon se muda à South Park, mas não se dá bem com ninguém. Os rapazes querem que Stan comece uma briga com ele, mas na verdade, ele acaba se tornando seu amigo. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Adrien Beard, Matt Stone, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T07E12

programme.title: 2003. Wendy termina o seu relacionamento com Stan, e para ajudá-lo, os meninos o levam a um restaurante famoso por suas asas de frango e suas belas garçonetes. programme.desc: South Park - T07E14

programme.title: 2004. Os protetores dos animais se manifestam contra o uso de uma vaca como mascote da escola, e os estudantes se veem forçados a buscarem uma nova mascote, o que gera um conflito entre Cartman e Kyle, já que ambos tem ideias diferetes. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T08E08

programme.title: 2004. Stan se encontra com alguns lindos animaizinhos do bosque, que pedem para ele alguns favores inocentes. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T08E14

programme.title: 2005. Stan e Cartman acabam inundando um dos vilarejos próximos a South Park. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker

Para chegar à verdade, Kyle e Stan se envolvem com uma sociedade bizarra que guarda um segredo lendário. programme.desc: Naruto: Tarde Demais Para Ajudar - T01E164

programme.desc: Naruto: A Morte De Naruto - T01E165

programme.sub-title: Um Ilimitado Abastecimento De Ferramentas Ninja!

programme.title: 2020. Naruto é atacado de novo pelo segundo ninja maligno, Jiga. Jiga ameaça a vida de Naruto quando Hinata chega correndo para salvá-lo. Hinata consegue resistir as ameaças e começa a lutar! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Byakugan Vê O Ponto Cego!
programme.desc: Naruto: O Byakugan Vê O Ponto Cego! - T01E190

programme.title: 2020. Renga confronta Naruto e Hinata. Declarando que já derrotou outros, ele avança e ordena a Naruto que lhe entregue a princesa. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Previsão: Morte! Céu Nublado Com Chance De Sol!
programme.desc: Naruto: Previsão: Morte! Céu Nublado Com Chance De Sol! - T01E191

programme.title: 2020. A princesa engordou por estar nervosa e quer que Ino finja de princesa para poder ir ao primeiro encontro com um príncipe que ela adora. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Ino Grita! Paraíso Da Gordura! - T01E192

programme.title: 2020. Lee abre um dojo por achar que não está treinando o suficiente. Ele espera que desafiantes venham ao dojo para lutá-lo. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Desafio Dojo!A Juventude Tem Tudo A Ver Com Paixão
programme.desc: Naruto: O Desafio Dojo!A Juventude Tem Tudo A Ver Com Paixão - T01E193

programme.title: 2020. A primeira-dama do País do Mel e seu cortejo desapareceram. Naruto, Kiba e Hinata vão numa missão e descobrem um castelo amedrontador no meio do caminho. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Misteriosa Maldição Do Castelo Mal-Assombrado
programme.desc: Naruto: A Misteriosa Maldição Do Castelo Mal-Assombrado - T01E194

programme.title: 2020. Durante a examinação médica de Lee, ele descobre que sua rede de chacra está muito prejudicada. Guy o leva para treinar na Academia para animá-lo. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Terceira Super Besta! - T01E195

programme.title: 2020. Procurando se vingar da morte de seu pai, Genho, a verdadeira identidade de Yagura e o mais velho dos irmãos Ryudoin, confronta Guy usando um jutsu distinto. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Confronto De Sangue-Quente: Aluno Contra Sensei
programme.desc: Naruto: Confronto De Sangue-Quente: Aluno Contra Sensei - T01E196

programme.title: 2020. Os Caçadores Especiais ANBU suspeitam que Genno, um carpinteiro da Aldeia Oculta da Folha, roubou plantas importantes da aldeia. Tsunade determina que quem usou Genno pretende atacar a aldeia e coloca todos em um Alerta de Segurança Nível-S! Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Crise: A Reunião Dos Onze Da Folha!
programme.desc: Naruto: Crise: A Reunião Dos Onze Da Folha! - T01E197

programme.title: 2020. Os Caçadores Especiais ANBU hipnotizam Naruto para extrair os motivos de Genno. Sem muito sucesso, a Aldeia das Cachoeiras irá conduzir manobras perto da fronteira da aldeia. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: O Anbu Desiste? A Lembrança De Naruto
programme.desc: Naruto: O Anbu Desiste? A Lembrança De Naruto - T01E198

programme.title: 2020. Durante a procura pelas plantas espalhadas, Naruto e sua equipe percebem que as ações de Genno é uma distração. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Erro Do Alvo - T01E199

programme.title: 2020. Naruto e os outros ficam chocados pelo número de papéis bombas colocadas pela aldeia. Enquanto removem os selos, Homura e Koharu inesperadamente chegam para ajudar. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: O Poderoso Ajudante - T01E200

programme.title: 2020. Naruto confronta Genno, e Shikamaru percebe que todas as armadilhas são uma distração. A intenção de Genno é enterrar a aldeia num deslizamento de pedras. Será que os 11 ninjas poderão salvar a aldeia da destruição? Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: Múltiplas Armadilhas! Contagem Regressiva Para A Destruição
programme.desc: Naruto: Múltiplas Armadilhas! Contagem Regressiva Para A Destruição - T01E201

programme.title: 2020. Naruto Uzumaki e Sakura pegam os microfones como apresentadores, e o programa começa. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: As Cinco Super Batalhas Ninja! - T01E202

programme.title: 2020. Naruto encontra uma jovem menina chamada Yakumo desenhando algo estranho. Os Caçadores Especiais ANBU e os médicos ninja chegam para levá-la. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Decisão De Kurenai: A Equipe Oito Está Dispensada
programme.desc: Naruto: A Decisão De Kurenai: A Equipe Oito Está Dispensada - T01E203

programme.desc: Naruto: O Poder Selado De Yakumo - T01E204

programme.title: 2020. Os atacantes são membros da clã Kurama da Aldeia Oculta da Folha. Naruto e os outros vão à vila para proteger Yakumo. Gêneros: Anime
programme.sub-title: A Missão Ultra Secreta De Kurenai: A Promessa Ao Terceiro Hokage
programme.desc: Naruto: A Missão Ultra Secreta De Kurenai: A Promessa Ao Terceiro Hokage - T01E205

programme.title: 2020. Naruto vai para o hospital, quando Unkai, o ninja que os atacou na vila, aparece. Eles procuram pela aldeia e chegam a uma teoria baseada nos movimentos dos insetos parasitas de Shino. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: Genjutsu Ou Realidade? - T01E206

programme.title: 2020. Naruto descobre que Yakumo pôs Kurenai numa situação desesperada, e o terrível segredo da vila Kurama é revelado. Gêneros: Anime
programme.desc: Naruto: A Habilidade Supostamente Selada - T01E207

programme.title: 2023. A gangue do duelista americano nº 1, Bandit Keith, sequestra Joey para uma caverna secreta com um cemitério como campo de jogo. Enquanto Yugi e seus amigos procuram por ele, Joey enfrenta monstros zumbis que ficam mais forte ao saírem de seus túmulos! Gêneros: Anime

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E21

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E22

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E23

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E26

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E27

programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T01E28

programme.desc: A warden (Eddie Albert) forces an ex-football star (Burt Reynolds) to lead fellow inmates in a game against the guards.

programme.title: Carrie (1976)
programme.desc: A social misfit (Sissy Spacek) with psychic powers wreaks havoc at her prom to get even with pranksters.

programme.title: Child's Play (1988)
programme.desc: A struggling single mother unknowingly gifts her son a doll imbued with a serial killer's consciousness.

programme.desc: As Tabitha and Jade's troubling history is brought to light, things begin to unravel for another resident in town; Boyd wants to test a dangerous theory.

programme.title: The Crying Game (1992)

programme.title: No Country for Old Men (2007)
programme.desc: An aging lawman (Tommy Lee Jones) reflects on his past and laments a changing world while trying to find and protect a hunter who took the cash from a drug deal gone bad.

programme.title: To Live and Die in L.A. (1985)
programme.sub-title: To Live and Die in L.A. (1985)

programme.title: I'm Gonna Git You Sucka (1988)

programme.title: Of Mice and Men (1992)
programme.desc: Migrant worker George (Gary Sinise) protects his strong, simple-minded friend Lennie (John Malkovich) in the 1930s California.

programme.title: The Long Riders (1980)
programme.desc: The Jesse James-Cole Younger gang leaves a trail of emptied banks, plundered stagecoaches and dead bodies in its wake.

programme.title: Tommy's Honour (2016)

programme.title: Lady Jane (1986)

programme.title: Elizabethtown (2005)

programme.title: Chasing Amy (1997)
programme.desc: A young cartoonist falls for a fellow artist, a lesbian with a long list of former lovers, creating an unexpected relationship.

programme.title: Nobody's Fool (1994)

programme.title: A Fish Called Wanda (1988)
programme.desc: An American (Jamie Lee Curtis) flirts with a crook, a barrister (John Cleese) and a mercenary (Kevin Kline) to find diamonds in London.

programme.title: Spaceballs (1987)
programme.desc: President Skroob (Mel Brooks) pits evil Dark Helmet (Rick Moranis) against Lone Starr and the half-man, half-dog Barf (John Candy).

programme.title: Baywatch (2017)
programme.desc: When a dangerous crime wave hits the beach, Mitch Buchannon leads his elite squad of lifeguards on a mission to prove that you don't have to wear a badge to save the bay.

programme.title: Team America: World Police (2004)
programme.desc: Puppet commandos protect the planet from fiendish terrorists and North Korean dictator Kim Jong Il (Trey Parker).

programme.title: Showgirls (1995)
programme.desc: A dancer (Elizabeth Berkley) becomes understudy in a Las Vegas show, sleeps with the boss (Kyle MacLachlan) and pushes the star (Gina Gershon) down a flight of stairs.

programme.title: Pocket Listing (2015)
programme.desc: When a power player and his sultry wife hire a disgraced property broker to discreetly market and sell their Malibu villa, double crosses, adultery, murder and revenge ensue.

programme.desc: Cord McNally searches for the two traitors whose treachery causes the loss of a dear friend and the defeat of McNally's unit.

programme.title: Molly's Game (2017)
programme.desc: Molly Bloom runs the world's most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested by the FBI. Her only ally is defense lawyer Charlie Jaffey, who learns that there is much more to Molly than the tabloids lead people to believe.

programme.title: Enemy at the Gates (2001)
programme.desc: A Nazi sniper (Ed Harris) travels to Stalingrad to find and kill a Russian sharpshooter (Jude Law), the hero of the propaganda campaign of a political officer (Joseph Fiennes).

programme.title: Eagle Eye (2008)
programme.desc: Two strangers (Shia LaBeouf, Michelle Monaghan) become pawns of a mysterious woman who threatens their friends and family and uses technology to control their actions.

programme.title: The Night Clerk (2020)
programme.desc: A hotel clerk becomes the prime suspect when a woman is murdered during his shift. As the police investigation closes in, he makes a personal connection with a guest -- but soon realizes he must stop the killer before she becomes the next victim.

programme.title: No Country for Old Men (2007)
programme.desc: An aging lawman (Tommy Lee Jones) reflects on his past and laments a changing world while trying to find and protect a hunter who took the cash from a drug deal gone bad.

programme.title: Total Recall (1990)
programme.desc: Recurring nightmares of the planet Mars lead a confused earthling into the center of an intergalactic conspiracy.

programme.title: Scream 4 (2011)

programme.title: The Return (2024)

programme.title: Wolves (2016)
programme.desc: A talented high school basketball player's (Taylor John Smith) dreams of playing college ball are jeopardized by his hard-drinking father's (Michael Shannon) compulsive gambling.

programme.title: Ali (2001)
programme.desc: Muhammad Ali (Will Smith) battles Sonny Liston, Joe Frazier and George Foreman and raises controversy outside the ring.

programme.title: Homefront (2013)

programme.title: Gangs of New York (2002)

programme.title: Scary Movie 4 (2006)
programme.desc: Dim-witted Cindy Campbell (Anna Faris) and her sex-crazed friend, Brenda (Regina Hall), team up with cute-but-clueless Tom Ryan (Craig Bierko) to save the world from a hostile alien invasion.

programme.title: Hot Rod (2007)
programme.desc: An accident-prone daredevil (Andy Samberg) plans an outrageous stunt to raise money for lifesaving surgery for his abusive stepfather.

programme.title: Staten Island Summer (2015)
programme.desc: Danny and Frank work as lifeguards for the summer and make plans to throw the wildest party of the season.

programme.title: Bucket List (2025)
programme.desc: When Ryan learns that he's been diagnosed with a rare, fatal illness his best friend Seth has other plans for him as he talks him into maxing out his credit cards and doing everything he's ever wanted to do from his Bucket List.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths (2012)
programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter (Colin Farrell) finds himself inadvertently entangled in the criminal underworld when his knucklehead friends (Christopher Walken, Sam Rockwell) abduct a mobster's beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.title: Rumours (2024)
programme.desc: Leaders of the world's wealthiest democracies become spectacles of incompetence, contending with increasingly surreal obstacles as night falls in the misty woods, and they realize they are suddenly alone.

programme.title: Scary Movie 4 (2006)
programme.desc: Dim-witted Cindy Campbell (Anna Faris) and her sex-crazed friend, Brenda (Regina Hall), team up with cute-but-clueless Tom Ryan (Craig Bierko) to save the world from a hostile alien invasion.

programme.title: Waking Up in Reno (2002)
programme.desc: A married man (Billy Bob Thornton) has an affair with his best friend's wife (Charlize Theron) while both couples travel from Arkansas to Nevada.

programme.title: Urban Cowboy (1980)
programme.desc: A Texas farmer (John Travolta) moves to the city, immerses himself in honky-tonk and falls for a sexy cowgirl (Debra Winger).

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October (1990)
programme.desc: Moscow, Washington and a CIA analyst (Alec Baldwin) track a renegade Soviet captain (Sean Connery) and his new submarine.

programme.title: Southpaw (2015)

programme.title: Taken (2008)
programme.desc: A former government operative comes out of retirement and uses all his extensive training to rescue his estranged daughter from a slave trade operation.

programme.title: 21 Jump Street (2012)
programme.desc: Two cops must confront their teenage angst all over again when they go undercover as high-school students.

programme.title: 22 Jump Street (2014)
programme.desc: Officers Jenko and Schmidt begin to question their partnership after each infiltrates different cliques while undercover at a local college.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider (2001)

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandora's box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: Taken (2008)
programme.desc: A former government operative comes out of retirement and uses all his extensive training to rescue his estranged daughter from a slave trade operation.

programme.title: Friday the 13th (1980)
programme.desc: The reopening of Camp Crystal Lake spells murder and mayhem for a group of sexually promiscuous counselors.

programme.title: Buddy Games (2019)
programme.desc: After a falling out, six lifelong friends reunite to play the buddy games -- an insane competition filled with absurd physical and mental challenges. Now, all bets are off, as the determined pals fight, claw and party for the chance to win $150,000.

programme.title: Jeff, Who Lives at Home (2011)
programme.desc: A 30-year-old slacker (Jason Segel) finds his true destiny while helping his brother (Ed Helms) stalk the latter's possibly adulterous wife.

programme.title: Old Guy (2024)
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn they're being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: War Pony (2022)
programme.desc: The interlocking stories of two young Oglala Lakota men grappling with a world built against them as they navigate their unique paths to manhood.

programme.title: Flight of the Intruder (1991)
programme.desc: Two Navy pilots (Willem Dafoe, Brad Johnson) hatch a rogue mission to bomb Hanoi with a special low-altitude plane.

programme.title: Flags of Our Fathers (2006)

programme.title: World Trade Center (2006)
programme.desc: Two Port Authority officers become trapped in the rubble of the World Trade Center after going in to help people escape from the buildings during the terrorist attacks of September 11, 2001.

programme.title: John Carpenter's Escape From L.A. (1996)
programme.desc: The fascist U.S. president enlists a jailed war hero (Kurt Russell) to retrieve a top-secret device stolen by his daughter on island Los Angeles in 2013.

programme.title: The Friend (2024)
programme.desc: Iris finds her comfortable New York City life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. Yet as Iris finds herself unexpectedly bonding with Apollo, she begins to come to terms with her past.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment (1983)
programme.desc: A strong-willed woman (Shirley MacLaine) and her equally independent daughter (Debra Winger) keep the lines of communication open as each deals with the curveballs life throws at them.

programme.title: Raging Grace (2023)
programme.desc: Nothing is as it seems when an undocumented Filipina immigrant takes a job as a caretaker for a terminally ill man in a lavish home. She and her daughter soon become ensnared by a terrible secret that threatens to tear them apart.

programme.title: Strange Darling (2023)
programme.desc: Nothing is what it seems when a twisted one-night stand spirals into a serial killer's vicious murder spree.

programme.title: Tabloid (2010)
programme.desc: In the 1970s, former Miss Wyoming Joyce McKinney becomes obsessed with a Mormon acquaintance and flies to England to abduct him after he goes there for missionary work.

programme.title: Spotlights: A Showtime Short Film Series
programme.desc: A collection of short films showcasing different themes.

programme.title: Camp X-Ray (2014)
programme.desc: A female guard at Guantánamo Bay forms an unlikely friendship with one of the facility's longtime detainees.

programme.title: Memory (2023)
programme.desc: Social worker Sylvia's structured life is blown apart when Saul follows her home from their high school reunion. Their surprise encounter profoundly impacts both of them as they open the door to the past.

programme.title: My Psychedelic Love Story (2020)
programme.desc: Filmmaker Errol Morris examines the love affair between LSD guru Timothy Leary and Joanna Harcourt-Smith.

programme.title: Bride and Prejudice (2004)
programme.desc: Mrs Bakshi is looking for suitable husbands for her daughters. When the rich single gents Balraj and Darcy visit, the Bakshis have high hopes, but circumstances get in the way of romance.

programme.title: Don't Knock Twice (2016)
programme.desc: A mother looking to reconnect with her estranged daughter attracts the attention of a demonic witch.

programme.title: Shell (2024)
programme.desc: Desperate to reclaim her career, once-beloved actress Samantha Lake gets drawn into the glamorous world of wellness mogul Zoe Shannon, only to uncover a monstrous truth beneath the seemingly flawless surface.

programme.title: Frida (2002)
programme.desc: Mexican painter Frida Kahlo (Salma Hayek) marries fellow artist Diego Rivera who shares her radical political views.

programme.title: Sid & Judy (2019)
programme.desc: Fifty years after the untimely death of Sid Luft's wife, Judy Garland, his journal provides insight into their marriage.

programme.title: The Guilt Trip (2012)
programme.desc: Pressured into taking his overbearing mother along for the ride, a man embarks on the road trip of a lifetime.

programme.title: L Word Mississippi: Hate the Sin
programme.desc: Exploring the lives of gay women living in the conservative, religious deep South and the unique hardships, bigotry, bullying, sexism and racism they endure.

programme.title: Beyond the Opposite Sex (2018)
programme.desc: A transgender man and woman face the challenges of maintaining relationships.

programme.title: Cusp (2021)

programme.title: Bride and Prejudice (2004)
programme.desc: Mrs Bakshi is looking for suitable husbands for her daughters. When the rich single gents Balraj and Darcy visit, the Bakshis have high hopes, but circumstances get in the way of romance.

programme.title: Backcountry (2014)
